Color & Contrast / contrastchecker / contrast

Run Color & Contrast / contrastchecker / contrast

Test run or drag to
bookmarklets bar to install

javascript:function%20validate(r%2Ct%2Ca)%7B6%21%3D%3Dt.length%26%268%21%3D%3Dt.length%7C%7CisNaN(HexToDec(t))%7C%7C4%3D%3Dt.length%26%260%3D%3Da%3F(r.attr(%7B%22aria-invalid%22%3A%210%2C%22aria-describedby%22%3A%22Error%22%2Ba%7D)%2C%24Err%5Ba%5D.slideDown(%22fast%22%2Cfunction()%7Br.focus()%7D)%2C%24Lig%5Ba%5D.parents(%22label%22).slideUp()%2C%24Pic%5Ba%5D.val(%22%23FFFFFF%22)%2C1%3D%3Da%26%26%24Alpha.val(%22%22))%3A(%24Hex%5Ba%5D.removeAttr(%22aria-invalid%20aria-describedby%22)%2C%24Err%5Ba%5D.slideUp()%2C%24Lig%5Ba%5D.parents(%22label%22).slideDown()%2Ccolor%5Ba%5D%3Dt.toUpperCase()%2Cupdate()%2CupdateAlpha())%2C%24Hex%5B0%5D.attr(%22aria-invalid%22)%7C%7C%24Hex%5B1%5D.attr(%22aria-invalid%22)%3F(%24(%22%23resultsContainer%22).slideUp()%2C%24(%22%5Baria-invalid%5D%22).closest(%22label%22).next().find(%22input%5Btype%3Dcolor%5D%22).val(%22%23FFFFFF%22))%3A%24(%22%23resultsContainer%22).slideDown()%7Dfunction%20update()%7B%24Hex%5B0%5D.val(color%5B0%5D)%2C%24Hex%5B1%5D.val(color%5B1%5D)%2C%22true%22%21%3D%24(%22%23Hex0%22).attr(%22aria-invalid%22)%26%26%24Pic%5B0%5D.val(%22%23%22%2Bcolor%5B0%5D)%2C%22true%22%21%3D%24(%22%23Hex1%22).attr(%22aria-invalid%22)%26%26%24Pic%5B1%5D.val(%22%23%22%2Bcolor%5B1%5D.substr(0%2C6))%2C%24(%22%23normal%2C%20%23big%2C%20%23ui%22).css(%7Bcolor%3A%22%23%22%2Bcolor%5B1%5D%2C%22background-color%22%3A%22%23%22%2Bcolor%5B0%5D%7D)%2C%24(%22%23uibox%22).css(%7B%22border-color%22%3A%22%23%22%2Bcolor%5B1%5D%7D)%2C%24(%22.permalink%22).attr(%22href%22%2C%22.%2F%3Ffcolor%3D%22%2Bcolor%5B1%5D%2B%22%26bcolor%3D%22%2Bcolor%5B0%5D)%2C%24(%27a%5Bhref*%3D%22linkcontrastchecker%22%5D%27).attr(%22href%22%2C%22%2Fresources%2Flinkcontrastchecker%2F%3Ffcolor%3D%22%2Bcolor%5B1%5D%2B%22%26bcolor%3D%22%2Bcolor%5B0%5D)%2C%24(%22.apilink%22).attr(%22href%22%2C%22.%2F%3Ffcolor%3D%22%2Bcolor%5B1%5D%2B%22%26bcolor%3D%22%2Bcolor%5B0%5D%2B%22%26api%22)%2C%24(%22.apilink%22).text(%22https%3A%2F%2Fwebaim.org%2Fresources%2Fcontrastchecker%2F%3Ffcolor%3D%22%2Bcolor%5B1%5D%2B%22%26bcolor%3D%22%2Bcolor%5B0%5D%2B%22%26api%22)%3Bvar%20r%3DRGBtoHSL(HexToDec(color%5B1%5D.substr(0%2C2))%2CHexToDec(color%5B1%5D.substr(2%2C2))%2CHexToDec(color%5B1%5D.substr(4%2C2)))%2Ct%3DRGBtoHSL(HexToDec(color%5B0%5D.substr(0%2C2))%2CHexToDec(color%5B0%5D.substr(2%2C2))%2CHexToDec(color%5B0%5D.substr(4%2C2)))%3B%24Lig%5B1%5D.val(Math.round(r%5B2%5D)).parent().css(%22background%22%2C%22linear-gradient(to%20right%2C%20%23000%2C%20hsl(%22%2Br%5B0%5D%2B%22%2C%22%2Br%5B1%5D%2B%22%25%2C50%25)%2C%20%23FFF)%22)%2C%24Lig%5B0%5D.val(Math.round(t%5B2%5D)).parent().css(%22background%22%2C%22linear-gradient(to%20right%2C%20%23000%2C%20hsl(%22%2Bt%5B0%5D%2B%22%2C%22%2Bt%5B1%5D%2B%22%25%2C50%25)%2C%20%23FFF)%22)%2CcheckContrast()%7Dfunction%20updateAlpha()%7B%22%22%3D%3D%24Hex%5B1%5D.val().substr(6%2C2)%3F%24Alpha.val(1)%3A%24Alpha.val((parseInt(%24Hex%5B1%5D.val().substr(6%2C2)%2C16)%2F255).toFixed(2))%7Dfunction%20RGBAtoRGB(r%2Ct)%7Bconst%20a%3D%7Br%3AHexToDec(r.substr(0%2C2))%2Cg%3AHexToDec(r.substr(2%2C2))%2Cb%3AHexToDec(r.substr(4%2C2))%2Ca%3AHexToDec(r.substr(6%2C2))%2F255%7D%2Co%3DHexToDec(t.substr(0%2C2))%2Ce%3DHexToDec(t.substr(2%2C2))%2Cs%3DHexToDec(t.substr(4%2C2))%3Bvar%20l%3Da.a%3BisNaN(l)%26%26(l%3D1)%3Bvar%20i%3DMath.round((1-l)*o%2Bl*a.r)%2Cc%3DMath.round((1-l)*e%2Bl*a.g)%2Cn%3DMath.round((1-l)*s%2Bl*a.b)%3Breturn(%220%22%2Bi.toString(16)).slice(-2)%2B(%220%22%2Bc.toString(16)).slice(-2)%2B(%220%22%2Bn.toString(16)).slice(-2)%7Dfunction%20changeHue(r)%7BHSL%3DRGBtoHSL(HexToDec(color%5Br%5D.substr(0%2C2))%2CHexToDec(color%5Br%5D.substr(2%2C2))%2CHexToDec(color%5Br%5D.substr(4%2C2)))%2CRGB%3DHSLtoRGB(HSL%5B0%5D%2CHSL%5B1%5D%2C%24Lig%5Br%5D.val())%3Bfor(var%20t%3D0%3Bt%3C3%3Bt%2B%2B)RGB%5Bt%5D%3DRGB%5Bt%5D%3E%3D16%3FRGB%5Bt%5D.toString(16)%3A%220%22%2BRGB%5Bt%5D.toString(16)%3Bcolor%5Br%5D%3D(RGB%5B0%5D%2BRGB%5B1%5D%2BRGB%5B2%5D%2Bcolor%5Br%5D.substr(6%2C2)).toUpperCase()%2Cupdate()%7Dfunction%20checkContrast()%7Bvar%20r%3DgetL(RGBAtoRGB(color%5B1%5D%2Ccolor%5B0%5D))%2Ct%3DgetL(color%5B0%5D)%2Ca%3D(Math.max(r%2Ct)%2B.05)%2F(Math.min(r%2Ct)%2B.05)%3B%24(%22%23ratio%22).html(%22%3Cb%3E%22%2BDec2(100*a%2F100)%2B%22%3C%2Fb%3E%3A1%22)%2Ca%3E%3D4.5%3F(%24(%22%23normalAA%2C%20%23bigAAA%22).attr(%22class%22%2C%22pass%22).text(%22Pass%22)%2C%24(%22%23ratioContainer%22).attr(%22class%22%2C%22pass%22))%3A(%24(%22%23normalAA%2C%20%23bigAAA%22).attr(%22class%22%2C%22fail%22).text(%22Fail%22)%2C%24(%22%23ratioContainer%22).removeClass(%22pass%22))%2Ca%3E%3D3%3F(%24(%22%23bigAA%22).attr(%22class%22%2C%22pass%22).text(%22Pass%22)%2C%24(%22%23uiAA%22).attr(%22class%22%2C%22pass%22).text(%22Pass%22))%3A(%24(%22%23bigAA%22).attr(%22class%22%2C%22fail%22).text(%22Fail%22)%2C%24(%22%23uiAA%22).attr(%22class%22%2C%22fail%22).text(%22Fail%22))%2Ca%3E%3D7%3F%24(%22%23normalAAA%22).attr(%22class%22%2C%22pass%22).text(%22Pass%22)%3A%24(%22%23normalAAA%22).attr(%22class%22%2C%22fail%22).text(%22Fail%22)%7Dfunction%20HexToDec(r)%7Bif(RegExp(%2F%5E%5Ba-f%7C0-9%5D%2B%24%2Fi).test(r))return%20parseInt(r%2C16)%7Dfunction%20HSLtoRGB(r%2Ct%2Ca)%7Bvar%20o%2Ce%3Breturn%20t%2F%3D100%2Co%3D2*(a%2F%3D100)-(e%3Da%3C%3D.5%3Fa*(1%2Bt)%3Aa%2Bt-a*t)%2C0%3D%3Dt%3FR%3DG%3DB%3Da%3A(R%3DfindRGB(o%2Ce%2Cr%2B120)%2CG%3DfindRGB(o%2Ce%2Cr)%2CB%3DfindRGB(o%2Ce%2Cr-120))%2C%5BMath.round(R*%3D255)%2CMath.round(G*%3D255)%2CMath.round(B*%3D255)%5D%7Dfunction%20RGBtoHSL(r%2Ct%2Ca)%7Bvar%20o%2Ce%3Breturn(a%3Da%2F51*.2)%3E(e%3D(r%3Dr%2F51*.2)%3E%3D(t%3Dt%2F51*.2)%3Fr%3At)%26%26(e%3Da)%2Ca%3C(o%3Dr%3C%3Dt%3Fr%3At)%26%26(o%3Da)%2CL%3D(e%2Bo)%2F2%2Ce%3D%3Do%3FS%3DH%3D0%3A(L%3C.5%3FS%3D(e-o)%2F(e%2Bo)%3AS%3D(e-o)%2F(2-e-o)%2Cr%3D%3De%26%26(H%3D(t-a)%2F(e-o))%2Ct%3D%3De%26%26(H%3D2%2B(a-r)%2F(e-o))%2Ca%3D%3De%26%26(H%3D4%2B(r-t)%2F(e-o)))%2CH%3DMath.round(60*H)%2CH%3C0%26%26(H%2B%3D360)%2CH%3E%3D360%26%26(H-%3D360)%2C%5BH%2CMath.round(100*S)%2CMath.round(100*L)%5D%7Dfunction%20findRGB(r%2Ct%2Ca)%7Breturn%20a%3E360%26%26(a-%3D360)%2Ca%3C0%26%26(a%2B%3D360)%2Ca%3C60%3Fr%2B(t-r)*a%2F60%3Aa%3C180%3Ft%3Aa%3C240%3Fr%2B(t-r)*(240-a)%2F60%3Ar%7Dfunction%20getsRGB(r)%7Breturn%20r%3D(r%3DHexToDec(r)%2F255)%3C%3D.03928%3Fr%2F12.92%3AMath.pow((r%2B.055)%2F1.055%2C2.4)%7Dfunction%20getL(r)%7Breturn.2126*getsRGB(r.substr(0%2C2))%2B.7152*getsRGB(r.substr(2%2C2))%2B.0722*getsRGB(r.substr(4%2C2))%7Dfunction%20Dec2(r)%7Bif(-1%21%3D%3D(r%3DString(r)).indexOf(%22.%22))%7Bvar%20t%3Dr.split(%22.%22)%3Breturn%201%3D%3Dt.length%3FNumber(r)%3ANumber(t%5B0%5D%2B%22.%22%2Bt%5B1%5D.charAt(0)%2Bt%5B1%5D.charAt(1))%7Dreturn%20Number(r)%7Dvar%20%24Alpha%2C%24colorInputs%2C%24ligSliders%2C%24Hex%3D%5B%5D%2C%24Pic%3D%5B%5D%2C%24Lig%3D%5B%5D%2C%24Err%3D%5B%5D%2Ccolor%3D%5B%5D%2CHSL%3D%5B%5D%3B%24(function()%7B%24Alpha%3D%24(%22%23Alpha1%22)%2C%24colorInputs%3D%24(%22%23Hex0%2C%20%23Hex1%2C%20%23Pic0%2C%20%23Pic1%22)%2C%24ligSliders%3D%24(%22%23Lig0%2C%20%23Lig1%22)%2C%24Hex%5B0%5D%3D%24(%22%23Hex0%22)%2C%24Hex%5B1%5D%3D%24(%22%23Hex1%22)%2C%24Pic%5B0%5D%3D%24(%22%23Pic0%22)%2C%24Pic%5B1%5D%3D%24(%22%23Pic1%22)%2C%24Lig%5B0%5D%3D%24(%22%23Lig0%22)%2C%24Lig%5B1%5D%3D%24(%22%23Lig1%22)%2C%24Err%5B0%5D%3D%24(%22%23Err0%22)%2C%24Err%5B1%5D%3D%24(%22%23Err1%22)%2C%24ligSliders.on(%22input%22%2Cfunction()%7BchangeHue(%24(this).attr(%22id%22).substr(-1))%7D)%2C%24colorInputs.change(function()%7Bvar%20r%3D%24(this)%2Ct%3Dr.val()%2Ca%3Dr.attr(%22id%22).substr(-1)%3Balpha%3D%24Hex%5B1%5D.val().substr(6%2C2)%2C%24Err%5Ba%5D.slideUp()%2C%22%23%22%3D%3Dt.substr(0%2C1)%26%26(t%3Dt.slice(1))%2C(3%3D%3Dt.length%7C%7C4%3D%3Dt.length%26%261%3D%3Da)%26%26(t%3Dt.substr(0%2C1).repeat(2)%2Bt.substr(1%2C1).repeat(2)%2Bt.substr(2%2C1).repeat(2)%2Bt.substr(3%2C1).repeat(2))%2C%22Pic1%22%3D%3Dr.attr(%22id%22)%26%26(t%2B%3Dalpha)%2Cvalidate(r%2Ct%2Ca%2Calpha)%7D)%2C%24(window).on(%22load%22%2Cfunction()%7Bvar%20r%3Dnew%20URLSearchParams(window.location.search)%3Br.get(%22fcolor%22)%3Fcolor%5B1%5D%3Dr.get(%22fcolor%22).replace(%22%23%22%2C%22%22).substring(0%2C8).toUpperCase()%3A%24Hex%5B1%5D.val()%3Fcolor%5B1%5D%3D%24Hex%5B1%5D.val()%3Acolor%5B1%5D%3D%220000FF%22%2Cr.get(%22bcolor%22)%3Fcolor%5B0%5D%3Dr.get(%22bcolor%22).replace(%22%23%22%2C%22%22).substring(0%2C6).toUpperCase()%3A%24Hex%5B1%5D.val()%3Fcolor%5B0%5D%3D%24Hex%5B0%5D.val()%3Acolor%5B0%5D%3D%22FFFFFF%22%2Cupdate()%2CupdateAlpha()%2Cvalidate(%24Hex%5B0%5D%2C%24Hex%5B0%5D.val()%2C0%2C%22%22)%2Cvalidate(%24Hex%5B1%5D%2C%24Hex%5B1%5D.val()%2C1%2C%24Hex%5B1%5D.val().substr(6%2C2))%7D)%2C%24Alpha.on(%22input%22%2Cfunction()%7Bif(%24(this).val()%3E1%3F%24(this).val(1)%3A%24(this).val()%3C0%26%26%24(this).val(0)%2C1%3D%3D%24(this).val())var%20r%3D%22%22%3Belse%20r%3D(%220%22%2BMath.round(255*%24Alpha.val()).toString(16)).slice(-2)%3Bcolor%5B1%5D%3D%24Hex%5B1%5D.val().substr(0%2C6)%2Br%2Cupdate()%7D)%2C%24(%22%23contrastForm%22).submit(function(r)%7Br.preventDefault()%7D)%7D)%3B
